description: bw CLI expanded with all artifact subcommands and format.rs output module
steps: Create crates/bw-cli/src/format.rs with: format_timestamp_ns(i64)->String (RFC3339), event_to_text(&BrowserEvent)->String, event_to_jsonl(&BrowserEvent)->String, event_to_csv_row(&BrowserEvent)->String, TIMELINE_CSV_HEADER constant, csv_escape helper
Add dirs = { workspace = true } to crates/bw-cli/Cargo.toml [dependencies] and root Cargo.toml [workspace.dependencies] (dirs = '6')

Rewrite crates/bw-cli/src/main.rs with Commands enum: Timeline(ArtifactArgs), History(ArtifactArgs), Downloads(ArtifactArgs), Cookies(ArtifactArgs), Bookmarks(ArtifactArgs), Extensions(ArtifactArgs), LoginData(ArtifactArgs), Autofill(ArtifactArgs), Session(ArtifactArgs), Cache(ArtifactArgs), Profiles(ProfilesArgs), Analyze(AnalyzeArgs)
ArtifactArgs: path: PathBuf, format: OutputFormat (text/jsonl/csv, default text)
Each artifact subcommand: detect browser family from path, dispatch to correct crate parser, print output
Analyze subcommand: parse history, call browser_core::analyze::rare_domains(&events, cap), print
Test in tests/cli_tests.rs: all these commands exit 0 with --help: cookies, downloads, bookmarks, extensions, login-data, autofill, session, cache, profiles, analyze
